name: NCXX Group Inc.
summary: NCXX Group Inc. engages in the development, sale, maintenance, and other services of communication equipment centered on mobile Internet devices and M2M modules. It also provides IoT solutions; Internet travel services; and nursing care services, as well as develops and sells nursing care robots and nursing care ICT systems. In addition, the company is involved in planning, developing, and selling agricultural ICT, as well as plans, manufactures, and sells original ethnic clothing and miscellaneous goods; and provides consulting, design, construction, system development operation and maintenance, network, database, and other infrastructure construction services in manufacturing, finance, distribution, and social public industries. NCXX Group Inc. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Hanamaki, Japan.
